articles.title: 伊朗战事最新动态：特朗普威胁升级袭击后油价飙升
articles.title_original: Iran War Live Updates: Oil Prices Surge After Trump Threatens to Escalate Attacks
articles.summary: 伊朗战事最新消息显示，特朗普威胁升级对伊袭击后，油价大幅上涨。特朗普在相关讲话中坚称此次对伊军事行动取得压倒性成功，不过并未提出清晰的行动退出战略。
articles.summary_original: In his address, President Trump also insisted that the military campaign was an overwhelming success but failed to offer a clear exit strategy.

articles.title: 独家：Beehiiv拓展播客业务，剑指Patreon
articles.title_original: Exclusive: Beehiiv expands into podcasting, taking aim at Patreon
articles.summary: 创作者服务平台Beehiiv拓展播客业务，正式对标竞品Patreon争夺创作者市场。为吸引创作者从Substack、Patreon等竞争对手平台转入，平台推出不抽取创作者收入分成的优惠政策，以此抢占市场份额。
articles.summary_original: One way Beehiiv is convincing creators to switch from rivals like Substack and Patreon is by not taking a cut of revenue.

articles.title: 乌干达一学校四名儿童被刺身亡
articles.title_original: Four children stabbed to death at Ugandan school
articles.summary: 乌干达一所学校发生凶案，造成四名儿童被刺身亡。警方发布简短声明通报该案情况，目前该案犯罪嫌疑人已被羁押，不过嫌疑人的作案动机尚不明确，暂未公布更多相关案情细节。
articles.summary_original: The suspect is in custody but his motive is unknown, the police say in a brief statement.

articles.title: 美国首次申领失业救济金人数降至接近两年低位
articles.title_original: US Initial Jobless Claims Fall to Just Shy of Two-Year Low
articles.summary: 上周美国首次申领失业救济金的人数出现下降，目前该数据已降至接近两年来的最低水平，这一态势表明，当前美国整体裁员规模仍处于低位，劳动力市场裁员活动整体保持平稳。
articles.summary_original: Applications for US unemployment benefits fell last week to one of the lowest levels in the last two years, suggesting layoffs remain low.

articles.title: 遭遇大规模赎回申请后 蓝枭资本限制旗下私人信贷基金赎回
articles.title_original: Blue Owl Limits Redemptions on Private Credit Funds After Massive Exit Requests
articles.summary: 蓝枭资本遭遇了前所未有的赎回申请激增潮，此次申请激增的规模，在总规模达1.8万亿美元的私人信贷市场的大型机构中尚属首次，蓝枭资本因此决定对旗下两只私人信贷基金实施赎回限制。
articles.summary_original: Blue Owl Capital Inc. will limit redemptions from two of its private credit funds after facing a surge in withdrawal requests that is unprecedented among major firms in the $1.8 trillion market.

articles.title: 交易竞争侵蚀垃圾贷款最后一道防线
articles.title_original: Dealmaking Competition Erodes Junk Loans’ Last Line of Defense
articles.summary: 穆迪评级发布分析显示，为在交易融资竞争中抢占业务击败对手，市场参与者纷纷放宽贷款契约要求，这使得投资级以下垃圾贷款的投资者失去了保护自身权益的最后一道防线。
articles.summary_original: Relaxing covenant requirements to win competitors in the race to fund deals is leaving sub-investment grade loan investors without their last line of defense, according to an analysis by Moody’s Ratings.

articles.title: 高盛遭遇炸弹威胁后 美国银行获巴黎警方保护
articles.title_original: US Banks Get Paris Police Protection After Goldman Bomb Threat
articles.summary: 多家驻巴黎的美国银行机构接连遭遇安全威胁，相关事件或与伊朗战事存在关联，其中高盛已接到炸弹威胁，目前巴黎警方已对当地美国银行全面收紧安保，提升安全防护等级。
articles.summary_original: Paris police are tightening security at US banks after a series of threats were made against the establishments in possible connection with the Iran war.

articles.title: 人权组织称布基纳法索军政府掌权以来超1800人遇害
articles.title_original: Over 1,800 killed since junta seized power in Burkina Faso, rights group says
articles.summary: 布基纳法索军政府夺取政权以来，该国累计已有超过1800人遇害。国际人权机构人权观察指出，特拉奥雷上尉、布基纳法索其他军方领导人以及境内圣战分子，可能需要对这一千八百余人的遇害事件承担责任。
articles.summary_original: Human Rights Watch says Capt Traoré, other military leaders and jihadists "may be liable" for the killings.

articles.title: 每日速递：油价上涨冲击塑料产业，SpaceX重磅IPO
articles.title_original: The Download: plastic’s problem with fuel prices, and SpaceX’s blockbuster IPO
articles.summary: 这是面向科技领域的工作日资讯通讯《每日速递》的今日刊。受伊朗局势持续影响，全球化石燃料价格飙升，已产生明显的全球经济连锁影响，后续高油价还将进一步波及塑料产业，本期内容同时关注SpaceX的重磅IPO。
articles.summary_original: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Fuel prices are soaring. Plastic could be next.  As the war in Iran continues, one of the most visible global economic ripple effects has been fossil-fuel prices. But looking ahead, further consequences could…

articles.title: 基建处/扬子江校区管委会党支部召开党员大会暨树立和践行正确政绩观学习教育读书班开班式 - newsweb.nuaa.edu.cn
articles.summary: 南京航空航天大学基建处/扬子江校区管委会党支部召开党员大会，同时举办树立和践行正确政绩观学习教育读书班开班式。此外，开封市龙亭区人民检察院也举办了同主题读书班，多家权威媒体围绕该主题发文，探讨科学决策、为民造福等相关议题。

articles.title: 抛售潮后印度计划重启公开市场股份回购
articles.title_original: India Plans to Bring Back Open Market Buybacks After Selloff
articles.summary: 受中东冲突拖累，印度本土股市目前徘徊在近一年低位，印度证券监管机构拟允许企业通过公开市场开展股份回购，以此回应投资者诉求，为当地股市提供支撑。
articles.summary_original: India’s securities regulator is proposing to allow companies undertake share buybacks via the open market, addressing investor demand to provide support to local stocks that are hovering near one-year lows, hurt by the war in the Middle East.

articles.title: 阿波罗高管泽尔特称对私募信贷的担忧只是成长阵痛
articles.title_original: Apollo’s Zelter Says Private Credit Concerns Are Just Growing Pains
articles.summary: 彭博社消息，阿波罗全球管理公司总裁吉姆·泽尔特为私募信贷行业辩护，称当前市场针对私募信贷的担忧不过是行业发展过程中的正常成长阵痛，他同时指出，投资者误读了公募与私募行业融合发展的趋势。
articles.summary_original: Jim Zelter, president at Apollo Global Management, offers a defense of private credit and says investors are missing the plot on the public/private convergence. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Cash App推出点对点转账“先享后付”功能
articles.title_original: Cash App launches ‘pay later’ feature for P2P pay transfers
articles.summary: Block宣布，其旗下移动支付应用Cash App正式推出全新功能，为点对点转账提供先享后付服务。该机构表示，这项新功能内置了强有力的保护机制，能够防止用户陷入所谓的债务螺旋。
articles.summary_original: Block says that the new feature has strong built-in protections to keep users from so-called debt spirals.

articles.title: 阿波罗总裁泽尔特称私人信贷担忧只是成长烦恼
articles.title_original: Apollo’s Zelter Says Private Credit Concerns Just Growing Pains
articles.summary: 阿波罗全球管理公司总裁吉姆·泽尔特公开为私人信贷领域辩护，淡化投资者针对该资产类别的担忧情绪，称私人信贷领域近期出现的相关变动，只不过是行业发展过程中的正常成长阵痛。
articles.summary_original: Apollo Global Management Inc. President Jim Zelter launched a full throated defense of private credit, downplaying investor concerns and describing recent developments in the asset class as mere “growing pains.”

articles.title: Flutterwave获尼日利亚小额贷款机构运营牌照
articles.title_original: Flutterwave Wins License to Operate as a Microlender in Nigeria
articles.summary: 非洲估值最高的金融科技独角兽Flutterwave公司，已获得尼日利亚颁发的全国性小额贷款机构运营牌照。获得牌照后，Flutterwave可在当地与银行展开竞争，开展相关小额借贷业务。
articles.summary_original: Flutterwave Inc., Africa’s most valuable financial-technology unicorn, has secured a Nigerian license to operate as a national microlender and will be able to compete with banks for business.

articles.title: 特朗普每次威胁退出北约都在掏空北约
articles.title_original: Every Trump Threat to Abandon NATO Hollows It Out
articles.summary: 特朗普屡次发出退出北约的威胁，每次相关表态都会加深北约盟友对美国是否会如约提供协防援助的疑虑，目前欧洲已开始考量组建脱离美国参与的新同盟，持续动摇北约的根基。
articles.summary_original: Doubts that the United States would come to the aid of NATO allies increase each time, prompting Europeans to consider an alliance without Washington.

articles.title: 马克龙：通过军事行动“解放”霍尔木兹海峡不现实 - 央广网
articles.summary: 央广网发布报道称，法国总统马克龙针对霍尔木兹海峡局势公开表态，明确指出通过军事行动“解放”霍尔木兹海峡的方案并不现实。霍尔木兹海峡是全球关键能源运输航道，其安全局势关乎全球能源供应与地区稳定，这一表态引发外界关注。

articles.title: 优步将四千美元“电动出行”补贴扩大至全美司机
articles.title_original: Uber expands its $4,000 ‘Go Electric’ grant to drivers nationwide
articles.summary: 去年起，优步仅在加州、科罗拉多州、马萨诸塞州以及纽约市等少数地区，向司机提供四千美元补贴，鼓励司机将燃油车更换为电动车，因项目效果不错，优步宣布将该补贴申领范围扩大至全美司机
articles.summary_original: Since last year, Uber has been offering drivers in a handful of locations - California, Colorado, Massachusetts and New York City - $4,000 to swap their gas guzzlers for electric vehicles. The company must have liked the results because today it announced that it would be expanding eligibility for its "Go Electric" grant to drivers […]

articles.title: Insider trading or random guy? It doesn’t matter to Polymarket
articles.title_original: Insider trading or random guy? It doesn’t matter to Polymarket
articles.summary: In mid-March, conspiracy theories swirled claiming Benjamin Netanyahu had been replaced by an AI clone. Though there was no actual proof that the Israeli Prime Minister had been injured or killed, on
articles.summary_original: In mid-March, conspiracy theories swirled claiming Benjamin Netanyahu had been replaced by an AI clone. Though there was no actual proof that the Israeli Prime Minister had been injured or killed, on X this spurred a flurry of posts promoting prediction markets where people bet on whether he would be out of office by March […]

articles.title: 春日经济新图景丨从“赏桃林”到“觅桃源”，林下经济“种”出田园新花样 - 新华网
articles.summary: 春假、清明连休催热春日经济，多地推出丰富春日消费新场景，既有非遗大集、惠民文旅、花卉消费等新玩法，也通过加开赏花专线、景区免票等配套服务激活消费。传统赏花经济升级，萍乡等地发展林下经济，为村民开辟增收新路径，勾勒出春日经济多元新图景。

articles.title: 尹力和张升民参加首都义务植树活动 - 新华网
articles.summary: 尹力、张升民参加首都义务植树活动，国内多家主流媒体推出相关生态文明建设主题内容。新华网推出微视频记录习近平总书记的春日绿色约定，还刊发文章解读“双增长”“双缩减”映照中国式现代化的生态底色，人民日报等也推出相关内容，呼应全民义务植树的绿色理念。

articles.title: 伊朗称本轮冲突爆发以来累计击落154架无人机 - QQ News
articles.summary: 伊朗官方通报称，自本轮冲突爆发以来，该国累计击落154架无人机。该消息由QQ新闻发布，目前仅放出核心信息点，完整报道并未在此处呈现，有需求的读者可前往Google新闻平台查看该报道的完整内容。

articles.title: 36氪晚报｜AI大模型产品“奇趣”完成千万级融资；阶跃星辰上线Step 3.5 Flash 2603模型；沃尔沃汽车第一季度全球销量同比下降11%
articles.summary: 这是36氪晚间新闻汇总，AI领域中AI大模型产品“奇趣”完成千万级融资，阶跃星辰上线Step 3.5 Flash 2603开发者模型；产业方面，滴滴租车推出多项服务机制降低履约纠纷，沃尔沃公布一季度全球销量同比降11%，另有投融资、零售、政策等多领域最新动态。

articles.title: 燃料价格飞涨，塑料或将成为下一个涨价品类
articles.title_original: Fuel prices are soaring. Plastic could be next.
articles.summary: 伊朗战事持续席卷中东地区，霍尔木兹海峡持续处于关闭状态，这一局势已引发全球经济连锁反应，化石燃料价格因此上涨，目前汽油均价已突破每加仑4美元，塑料价格大概率将随之走高。
articles.summary_original: As the war in Iran continues to engulf the Middle East and the Strait of Hormuz stays closed, one of the most visible global economic ripple effects has been fossil-fuel prices. In particular, you can’t get away from news about the price of gasoline, which just topped an average of $4 a gallon in the…

articles.title: 聚焦“回流药”顽疾，国家医保局开展专项打击行动 - 21财经
articles.summary: 针对套刷医保卡、倒卖“回流药”等医保欺诈骗保顽疾，国家医保局开展专项打击行动，医保基金使用监管实施细则已落地。多地公开征集相关违法违规线索，最高奖励20万元，同时依托全流程全领域全链条智能监管，为医保基金装上“数字天眼”。

articles.title: 在噤声的俄罗斯，他仍直言不讳
articles.title_original: In a Muzzled Russia, He Still Speaks His Mind
articles.summary: 2022年俄罗斯对乌克兰开战之后，数百名俄罗斯记者被迫流亡海外，诺贝尔和平奖得主德米特里·穆拉托夫选择留在国内，在言论受严格管控的环境下，他并未保持沉默，依然坚持公开发表自身观点。
articles.summary_original: While hundreds of other journalists fled into exile after Moscow’s invasion of Ukraine in 2022, the Nobel Peace Prize laureate Dmitri A. Muratov stayed. But he did not stay quiet.

articles.title: 巴西新法赋予分居夫妇宠物共同监护权
articles.title_original: Brazil grants joint custody over pets in new law for separated couples
articles.summary: 巴西出台针对分居夫妇的新法律，明确赋予分居夫妇对宠物的共同监护权。巴西国会议员周二表示，这项法律修订反映出民众对宠物的重视，契合宠物在当代家庭中的重要地位。
articles.summary_original: Lawmakers in the Brazilian Congress on Tuesday viewed the law change as a reflection on the importance people place on their pets.

articles.title: 张雪机车夺冠幕后，看见“宁波造” - 新华网浙江
articles.summary: 车手德比斯驾驶宁波制造的张雪机车夺得赛事冠军，这一成绩引爆品牌热度，相关机车产品上线小程序仅两周销量就突破一万台，既带动更多人爱上机车运动，也获得资本青睐，投资方纷纷入局抢投。

articles.title: 海湾国家考虑修建新管道绕开霍尔木兹海峡 - 京报网
articles.summary: 多家媒体报道，海湾国家正考虑修建新输油管道，以绕开全球核心石油运输咽喉霍尔木兹海峡。近期国际原油市场出现新变动，沙特3月原油出口量腰斩，印度或时隔七年恢复进口伊朗原油。

articles.title: 友谊不再 关系破裂：伊朗战事如何分裂海外伊朗侨民
articles.title_original: Lost Friendships, Broken Relationships: How the War in Iran Is Dividing the Diaspora
articles.summary: 伊朗本土已持续数月深陷抗议、镇压与战事动荡，旅居海外的伊朗侨民正因本国局势遭遇迄今最严重的内部分裂，不少侨民原本的友谊与亲密关系因立场分歧破裂，整个侨民群体出现巨大裂痕。
articles.summary_original: Amid months of protest, repression and war in their native country, Iranians living abroad are navigating their biggest rifts yet.

articles.title: 欧洲推动打造对儿童更友好的互联网
articles.title_original: Europe Pushes for a Gentler Internet for Children
articles.summary: 欧盟及欧洲各国政府正推动对社交媒体及平台运行算法进行调整优化，目的是降低网络产品对用户的成瘾性，提升网络空间整体安全性，重点为儿童营造更健康友好的上网环境。
articles.summary_original: The European Union and national capitals are trying to make social media and algorithms less addictive and safer, especially for children.

articles.title: 诱捕行动后 巴沙尔·阿萨德表亲因武器换毒品交易获罪
articles.title_original: After Sting Operation, Cousin of Bashar al-Assad Convicted in Arms for Drugs Deal
articles.summary: 巴沙尔·阿萨德的表亲安托万·卡西斯经诱捕行动调查后被定罪。他试图将倒台政权流出的武器出售给哥伦比亚民兵，该交易属于武器换毒品交易，卡西斯最终被裁定串谋支持恐怖组织罪名成立。
articles.summary_original: The cousin, Antoine Kassis, was found guilty of conspiracy to support a terrorist group, after trying to sell weapons from the fallen regime to a Colombian militia.

articles.title: 雄安“15分钟生活圈”擦亮民生底色- 民生 - 中工网
articles.summary: 多家权威媒体聚焦雄安这座“未来之城”的建设发展，关注其全域智能建设、央企落户等动态，重点报道雄安从幼有所育到老有所养的全龄民生保障布局，介绍当地打造“15分钟生活圈”，以科技赋能民生，绘就宜居未来城市新图景。

articles.title: “天哪，太壮观了！”：看BBC科学编辑对发射的反应
articles.title_original: 'Oh my goodness, that is spectacular!': See BBC science editor react to launch
articles.summary: 美国航空航天局NASA的阿耳忒弥斯二号已发射升空，目前正环绕地球轨道运行，后续将开启绕月飞行任务。BBC科学编辑目睹此次发射后难掩激动，发出惊叹直呼场面十分壮观。
articles.summary_original: Nasa's Artemis II has blasted off and is now orbiting Earth, before continuing on to circle the Moon.

articles.title: 轻舟、元戎秘交上市资料，和Momenta冲刺港股IPO | 36氪独家
articles.summary: 36氪独家获悉，轻舟智航、元戎启行、Momenta三家头部自动驾驶算法公司已秘密向港交所递表，冲刺年内港股IPO。三家均手握量产订单，借当前商业逻辑初步闭环的窗口抢滩，意在打通融资渠道，应对行业收敛与资本偏好变化。

articles.title: 撒哈拉沙尘笼罩克里特岛 希腊风暴致一人死亡
articles.title_original: Man dies in storm as Saharan dust shrouds Crete
articles.summary: 希腊多个地区近日遭遇强降雨袭击，雅典附近发生洪水灾害，造成一名男子不幸遇难。与此同时，一场来自撒哈拉的沙尘暴席卷希腊克里特岛，整座岛屿被沙尘笼罩，当地接连出现极端恶劣天气。
articles.summary_original: A man dies in flooding near Athens as rain lashes several regions in Greece, while a Saharan dust storm enveloped Crete.

articles.title: 泡泡玛特无需下一个LABUBU
articles.summary: 3月25日泡泡玛特发布2025年财报，全年营收371.2亿元、净利润130.1亿元，同比分别大增185%、293%，亮眼成绩却引发资本市场负面情绪，公司随即斥资12亿港元回购稳信心。市场担忧其依赖LABUBU单一IP，实际泡泡玛特多IP矩阵成型，长线运营能力支撑高质量增长。

articles.title: 埃隆·马斯克旗下SpaceX将启动1万亿美元估值上市
articles.title_original: Elon Musk's SpaceX set to go public in $1 trillion share listing
articles.summary: 埃隆·马斯克旗下太空探索技术公司SpaceX即将上市，此次上市估值达1万亿美元，将成为全球历史上估值最高的首次公开募股之一，有望助力马斯克成为全球首位万亿富翁。
articles.summary_original: The company’s public stock debut is set to be one of the most valuable in history, and could make Musk the world's first trillionaire.

articles.title: 中国瞄准月球 美国宇航局密切关注
articles.title_original: China’s Aiming for the Moon, and NASA Is Looking Over Its Shoulder
articles.summary: 美国航空航天局于周三开展了一次月球飞越任务。中国正以高度专注投入推进自主探月航天计划，中国的探月进程引发美方高度关注，相关内容已通过图文、视频形式整理呈现。
articles.summary_original: The U.S. space agency launched a lunar flyby Wednesday, but Beijing is pursuing its own space program with formidable focus. Here’s what we know about it, in photos and videos.

articles.title: 遭多年批评后澳大利亚将严打赌博广告
articles.title_original: Australia to crack down on gambling ads after years of criticism
articles.summary: 长期以来，澳大利亚人均赌博损失金额居全球首位，赌博广告泛滥等相关问题长期饱受各界批评。近日澳大利亚宣布将推出严厉举措，打击各类违规赌博广告，治理国内突出的赌博问题。
articles.summary_original: Australians lose more money to gambling, per capita, than anywhere else in the world.

articles.title: 获韶音投资，一家AI公司做了“硬件版OpenClaw” | 36氪独家
articles.summary: 2024年成立的AI公司无界方舟，打造出硬件端侧的AI操作系统EVA，堪称硬件版OpenClaw，可支持AI通过自然语言自主完成硬件应用的研发、部署与迭代，大幅降本提效。近期该公司完成连续两轮Pre-A轮融资，投资方包括韶音等，过去一年累计融资数亿元。

articles.title: 印尼附近海域发生7.4级地震 致一人死亡
articles.title_original: Magnitude 7.4 earthquake hits off Indonesia, killing one
articles.summary: 印尼万鸦老岛与特尔纳特岛之间海域发生7.4级地震，此次地震已造成一人死亡。地震发生后相关方面曾发布海啸预警，提醒周边区域防范灾害风险，目前该海啸预警已经正式解除。
articles.summary_original: The quake struck between the islands of Manado and Ternate. Tsunami warnings have now been lifted.

articles.title: 特朗普试图平息伊朗开战紧张情绪 关键问题仍未作答
articles.title_original: Trump leaves key questions unanswered as he seeks to calm nerves over Iran war
articles.summary: BBC记者加里·奥多诺休撰文指出，特朗普为安抚公众对伊朗开战的不安情绪，发表全国黄金时段讲话，此番讲话存在多处明显疏漏，诸多公众关心的关键问题都没有给出明确解答。
articles.summary_original: There were some glaring omissions in the president's primetime address, writes the BBC's Gary O'Donoghue.

articles.title: 中国经济圆桌会共话科技创新与产业创新深度融合 - chinanews.com.cn
articles.summary: 中国经济圆桌会举办，与会各方围绕科技创新与产业创新深度融合这一主题展开交流探讨，共商相关领域融合发展的方向与路径。该主题报道由中国新闻网出品，感兴趣的读者可前往Google新闻平台查看完整报道内容。

articles.title: 36氪首发 | 00后交大博士做仿生飞行机器人，获启高、奇绩创坛、交大母基金等投资
articles.summary: 深圳鹰瞰智翼近期完成千万元级别天使轮融资，由启高资本领投，奇绩创坛、上海交大母基金跟投。这家由00后交大博士团队创办的全球首家专注具身智能扑翼机器人的企业，已布局两条产品线，核心技术为自研全球首个机器人流体仿真引擎，本轮资金将用于产品研发、量产与引擎搭建。

articles.title: 抖音生活服务组织架构大调整，中小商家更重要了｜独家
articles.summary: 36氪独家获悉，抖音生活服务完成负责人浦燕子接任后的第二次组织架构大调整，本次按商户GMV分层拆分线上线下部门，线上服务规模商户，线下专门渗透月GMV5万以下中小商家，还单独拆分酒旅板块，抖音计划2026年实现GMV超越美团并达成盈利。

articles.title: 8点1氪丨甲骨文凌晨突发邮件裁员3万人；市监局回应张雪机车禁止新手购买；SpaceX据悉秘密提交IPO文件，估值或超过1.75万亿美元
articles.summary: 近期海内外多个领域热点频发：全球软件巨头甲骨文裁员约3万人，占其全球员工总数18%；国内多家航司宣布上调燃油附加费，涨幅达5倍；马斯克旗下SpaceX秘密提交IPO文件，估值或超1.75万亿美元；特斯拉正式停产Model S与Model X；多部门已启动核查违规进口保健品“优思益”，另有多个科技财经动态引发关注。

articles.title: 特朗普出生公民权禁令或失败 但当局已然走得太远
articles.title_original: Trump’s birthright citizenship ban may fail — but the administration already got too far
articles.summary: 美国最高法院周三开庭审理特朗普诉芭芭拉一案，该案针对特朗普2025年发布的禁止出生公民权的行政令。大法官对特朗普政府的主张持怀疑态度，不过受理此案本身已显现出自特朗普首个任期以来本土主义者已取得不少进展。
articles.summary_original: On Wednesday morning, the Supreme Court heard arguments in Trump v. Barbara, a case challenging President Donald Trump's 2025 executive order banning birthright citizenship. Justices seemed skeptical of the administration's argument, but by taking up birthright citizenship at all, they showed how much ground nativists have gained since Trump's first term. The 14th Amendment is […]

articles.title: DeFi平台Drift遭黑客盗走数百万加密货币后暂停存取款
articles.title_original: De-fi platform Drift suspends deposits and withdrawals after millions in crypto stolen in hack
articles.summary: 去中心化金融平台Drift遭黑客攻击发生加密货币失窃事件，区块链追踪机构估算涉案金额达数亿美元，该事件目前已是2026年迄今为止规模最大的加密货币盗窃案，案发后平台已暂停存取款业务。
articles.summary_original: Blockchain trackers put the cryptocurrency heist in the hundreds of millions of dollars and is already on track to be the largest crypto theft in 2026 so far.

articles.title: NASA发射阿尔忒弥斯二号任务 送四名航天员奔赴月球
articles.title_original: NASA launches four astronauts toward the Moon on the Artemis II mission
articles.summary: 时隔五十余年，NASA阿尔忒弥斯二号任务于周三晚成功发射，将搭载四名航天员前往月球，这也是半个多世纪以来人类首次再度送航天员赴月球。该任务隶属于阿尔忒弥斯计划，计划旨在最早于2028年实现人类重返月球。
articles.summary_original: NASA's Artemis II flight, which is set to take four astronauts toward the Moon for the first time in more than 50 years, successfully launched on Wednesday evening. The Artemis II mission, part of NASA's Artemis program that's intended to bring humans back onto the Moon as early as 2028, will bring the four astronauts […]

articles.title: 美国原油触及110美元 股债暴跌：市场综述
articles.title_original: Stocks and Bonds Tumble as US Crude Hits $110: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: 美国总统特朗普打破了市场关于中东战事将快速结束、能源供应中断状况将得到缓解的乐观预期，推动美国原油价格再度飙升至110美元，受此影响，全球股票和债券类资产价格齐齐下挫。
articles.summary_original: Stocks and bonds fell as oil surged anew, with President Donald Trump dashing optimism that the war in the Middle East is nearing a swift resolution and that disruptions to energy flows will ease.

articles.title: Anthropic下架数千含其泄露源代码的GitHub仓库 公司称系误操作
articles.title_original: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident
articles.summary: 人工智能企业Anthropic近日下架了GitHub平台上数千个存储该公司泄露源代码的代码仓库，该公司高管证实此次大规模下架操作属于意外事故，目前已经撤回了大部分下架通知。
articles.summary_original: Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.

articles.title: Anthropic下架数千个存有其泄露源代码的GitHub仓库 公司称此举系误操作
articles.title_original: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident
articles.summary: 代码托管平台GitHub上出现大量存储Anthropic泄露源代码的仓库后，Anthropic对数千个相关仓库发起下架操作。该公司高管表示，此次下架行为属于误操作，目前已撤回大部分下架通知。
articles.summary_original: Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.

articles.title: 特朗普威胁升级局势 原油涨至110美元柴油突破200美元
articles.title_original: Oil Hits $110 and Diesel Tops $200 as Trump Threatens Escalation
articles.summary: 美国总统特朗普誓言未来几周升级对伊朗战事，此举可能导致核心航道霍尔木兹海峡的能源运输中断长期化，受该消息影响，国际油价上涨，原油涨至110美元，柴油价格突破200美元。
articles.summary_original: Oil rallied after US President Donald Trump vowed an escalation in the war in Iran over the coming weeks, a move that could prolong disruptions to energy flows through the vital Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: 陷入困境的YC初创公司Delve声誉进一步恶化
articles.title_original: The reputation of troubled YC startup Delve has gotten even worse
articles.summary: 深陷负面风波的YC初创企业Delve再遭丑闻冲击，该公司目前面临新指控，被指违反客户Sim.ai的开源许可协议，擅自挪用客户开发的工具，并将其冒充为自有产品，公司声誉因此进一步受损。
articles.summary_original: Delve faces new allegations that it violated the open source license of its customer, Sim.ai, by taking the customers's tool and passing it off as its own.

articles.title: 系统故障致百度自动驾驶出租车在中国瘫痪
articles.title_original: ‘System failure’ paralyzes Baidu robotaxis in China
articles.summary: 百度在中国运营的自动驾驶出租车突发系统故障，服务全面陷入瘫痪。此次故障造成多名搭乘自动驾驶出租车的乘客被困车中，部分乘客被困时长最长可达两个小时，目前暂未披露故障的具体原因与后续处置方案。
articles.summary_original: Passengers in Baidu's robotaxis were trapped for up to two hours.

articles.title: 新约会应用Sonder注册流程故意设扰 收效良好
articles.title_original: A new dating app, Sonder, has a deliberately annoying sign-up process (and it’s working)
articles.summary: 全新约会应用Sonder采用刻意设计的繁琐恼人注册流程，目前该模式收效良好。这款应用不对个人主页设置结构化框架，鼓励用户打造类似情绪板或数字拼贴的个人页面，风格偏向随性的MySpace，而非职场化的领英。
articles.summary_original: Sonder profiles are completely unstructured, encouraging users to build something that looks like a mood board or a digital collage. Think MySpace rather than LinkedIn.

articles.title: 一季度初创企业融资打破所有历史纪录
articles.title_original: Startup funding shatters all records in Q1
articles.summary: 一季度初创企业融资额创下季度历史新高，这一破纪录表现主要由投向OpenAI、Anthropic、xAI、Waymo的四笔巨额融资拉动，同时也反映出当前初创融资市场整体热度较高。
articles.summary_original: The record quarterly fundraise largely fueled four mega-deals into OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, and Waymo. But it also indicates a generally hot market.

articles.title: 阿尔忒弥斯月球基地项目存在法律争议
articles.title_original: The Artemis Moon base project is legally dubious
articles.summary: 美国NASA计划于周三发射四名宇航员执行阿尔忒弥斯二号任务，重返月球的进程再度启动。本次任务中，宇航员将搭乘猎户座飞船绕月飞行，十天后返回地球，测试项目相关硬件系统，该月球基地项目本身存在法律争议。
articles.summary_original: With NASA planning to launch four astronauts on Wednesday on its Artemis II mission, the race to return to the Moon is back on. The current mission will see astronauts aboard the Orion capsule travel around the Moon before returning to Earth in 10 days' time. They'll be testing out the hardware and systems that […]

articles.title: 苹果为旧款iPhone与iPad发布安全修复补丁 抵御DarkSword攻击
articles.title_original: Apple releases security fix for older iPhones and iPads to protect against DarkSword attacks
articles.summary: 苹果针对旧款iPhone与iPad推出安全更新，可抵御借助泄露黑客工具DarkSword发起的攻击，为旧款苹果移动设备补上相关安全漏洞，避免设备遭到该类恶意攻击的侵害。
articles.summary_original: The security update protects a raft of older iPhones and iPads from attacks linked to leaked hacking tools called DarkSword.
